title: No-insulation multi-width winding for high temperature superconducting magnets
status_note: Active; GP shows adjusted expiration 2033-07-19; indicative
claim_theme: NI double-pancake stack with multi-width tape grading
indep_claim_gist: HTS magnet = stack of double-pancake coils wound without turn-to-turn insulation; DP coils graded by tape width along stack, substantially narrower conductor at stack midpoint than at ends.
notes: Foundational Hahn/Iwasa NI patent. Blocks graded-width NI pancake stacks; single-width NI coils sit outside claim geometry. Expiry ~2033 opens window inside 2029/2030 launch horizon. U-012.

title: Partial insulation superconducting magnet
claim_theme: Turn-level NI with layer-to-layer insulation hybrid
indep_claim_gist: Magnet with bobbin and coil of multiple layers of non-insulated superconducting wire, adjacent turns in contact within each layer, insulation material arranged between first and second wire layers.
notes: MIT PI family (3 US grants). Covers the layer-insulated/turn-NI hybrid used to cut charging delay while keeping self-protection. Expires ~2033. U-012, U-025.

title: Rare earth barium copper oxide magnet coils and methods
assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation Inc
claim_theme: Rc control via resistive coatings and plated interlayers
indep_claim_gist: Coil CONSISTING OF a REBCO tape and a thin resistive layer of copper oxide, Cr, Ni, or Ni-P coated onto the tape, wound into a coil (closed 'consisting of' transition).
notes: Core Rc-engineering grant (Jun Lu/NHMFL lineage; WO also fetched). Spec covers plated-SS co-wind giving ~10x Rc. 'Consisting of' narrows literal scope - counsel question on DOE reach. Nearest art to WS-1/WS-2. U-012.

title: Feedback control for no-insulation high-temperature superconducting magnet
assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation Inc
status_note: Granted as US11094438B2 (Active, GP shows expiry 2038-03-20) and continuation US11551840B2; indicative
claim_theme: Field-feedback power-supply control to cancel NI charging delay
indep_claim_gist: Method: establish reference magnetic field for NI HTS coil; excite with power supply; monitor difference between reference and measured field; feedback-control supply current to track reference, reducing charging delay and field instability.
notes: The charter-referenced FSU active-feedback charging-delay work (Hahn/Larbalestier). Blocks field-feedback charging compensation for NI coils - direct constraint on any C10-side 'NI-aware' drive feature. U-025, U-015.

title: Partially-insulated HTS coils
status_note: WO ceased; national grants displayed active incl. US11101060B2, CN112041947B; indicative
claim_theme: Partially insulating interlayer with windowed conductive strip
indep_claim_gist: HTS field coil: turns of HTS plus metallic stabilizer separated by partially insulating layer allowing turn-to-turn current sharing; layer = conducting strip insulation-coated both sides with offset windows creating defined radial current paths.
notes: TE's base PI family, granted in CN (CN112041947B) - PI construction fenced inside China by a UK company. Description recites interlayer resistivity bands (~1e2-1e15 x copper). Design-around = Rc set by tape surface not discrete windowed strip. Expiry ~2039. U-012, U-025.

title: HTS linked partial insulation for HTS field coils
status_note: WO ceased; family grants displayed incl. US12592332B2, CN114846566B, EP4078630B1; indicative
claim_theme: PI layer with HTS-bridge current-limiting radial paths
indep_claim_gist: HTS field coil whose partially insulating layer contains insulating region plus electrically conductive paths, each path an HTS bridge in series with normal conductor, acting as superconducting current limiters for radial current.
notes: Second-generation TE PI; granted US/CN/EP/JP/KR. Blocks bridge-limited PI variants; passive-resistive interlayers unaffected. U-025.

title: HTS field coils
status_note: Granted CN115485868B, displayed active; EP sibling EP4147281B1 granted 2025-04-09; indicative
claim_theme: Buffer-layer-insulation coil via tape edge material removal
notes: Claim read (both CN and EP siblings fetched): wind HTS tapes then remove material from axial tape edges so the internal buffer layer provides turn-to-turn isolation. Voltage-tap resistive monitoring appears only as supplementary description, not claims - nearest art to WS-1. U-001.

title: Rapid dump of partially insulated superconducting magnet
status_note: WO ceased; family grants displayed incl. EP3884505B1, JP7585202B2, KR102715485B1, CN113330525B; indicative
claim_theme: Reverse-current bulk energy dump through PI radial path
indep_claim_gist: HTS magnet system: PI field coil with conductive interlayer permitting turn-to-turn sharing; power supply drives forward current for ramp-up and reverse current on ramp-down, heating winding bulk uniformly through the radial path for safe rapid dump.
notes: This is the captive TE active-protection method behind U-025 (multi-MJ NI/PI protection not purchasable). Two US A-publications still pending 2025 - claims can grow. CN113330525B granted. Design-around: external dump electronics for third-party coils not tied to reverse-current-through-PI method.

title: HTS magnet ramping to reduce screening currents
status_note: WO ceased; US20250029761A1 and EP4437571A1 displayed pending; indicative
claim_theme: I/Ic-threshold controlled ramping suppresses screening currents
notes: Claim read: energize/de-energize while monitoring condition indicative of I/Ic; feedback on current or net cooling keeps I/Ic above threshold (~0.7) to reduce screening currents. Operational-method art nearest to WS-5 (no winding-parameter claims). Pending - watch claim growth. U-007 adjacent.

title: Magnet structures comprising a high temperature superconductor (HTS) cable in groove
assignee: Massachusetts Institute of Technology; Commonwealth Fusion Systems LLC
status_note: WO ceased; US20230282400A1 displayed pending; KR102912138B1, JP7720870B2 granted; indicative
claim_theme: Solder-filled HTS cable in structural groove (NI-class construction)
notes: Claim read: insert HTS cable in support-structure groove, flow molten metal into cable in place; apparatus counterpart. CFS/MIT route makes structure the insulation-free current-sharing medium - alternative lineage to tape-wound NI. US claims still pending. U-012.

title: High-temperature superconducting coil having smart insulation, high-temperature superconducting wire used therefor, and manufacturing method therefor
status_note: WO ceased; US10861626B2 granted; CN107949890A family member published; indicative
notes: Claim read: HTS coil with metal-insulator-transition material layer between adjacent wires - insulating in normal operation, conductive on quench. Korea NI lineage (KERI). Material-class-specific; passive metallic interleaves unaffected. CN family member extends to China. U-012.

title: Superconducting race track coil using superconducting wire without insulation
assignee: Research Institute of Industrial Science & Technology (재단법인 포항산업과학연구원, RIST); POSCO
claim_theme: NI race-track coil with metal surface layer between turns
notes: Claim read: race-track coil of non-insulated SC wire surface-treated with metal layer, adjacent metal layers between turns. Earliest priority (2011) in the NI-with-engineered-metal-interface set - predates MIT 2012. KR-only, machine-application context; prior-art value > blocking value.

title: Uninsulated superconducting magnet
status_note: Displayed 'Expired - Fee Related' terminated 2021-12-25 - verify before reliance
claim_theme: Inter-turn conductive/thermal filler with specified Rc range
notes: Claim read: NI magnet, inter-turn spaces filled with conductive+thermal+curing+wetting material mixture; turn-to-turn resistance specified 0.1 ohm-100 kohm. Early CN claim on an ENGINEERED Rc RANGE - novelty-relevant prior art against broad 'specified Rc band' claims even though it displays lapsed. U-012.

title: Metallic insulation for superconducting coils
assignee: General Dynamics Corp (displayed current: Lockheed Martin Corp)
status_note: Displays 'Expired - Fee Related' - verify before reliance
claim_theme: Oxide-coated high-resistivity metal turn insulation with shunt windows
notes: Claim read: coil with metallic turn-to-turn insulation of Ti/Al/Ta-alloy coated with own oxide; oxide selectively removed to create shunt paths that propagate quench for safe discharge. 1980s fusion-magnet MI concept incl. engineered shunt windows - strong prior art against windowed-interlayer breadth (cf. P02-05).

title: High-temperature superconducting cable and high-temperature superconducting magnet
title_zh: 高温超导电缆及高温超导磁体
assignee: 晏超聚能上海科技有限公司 (Yanchao Juneng Shanghai Technology Co., Ltd., as displayed)
status_note: Displayed Active (CN utility model, ~10y term to 2035); indicative
claim_theme: Sub-cable current diversion via cladding and cooling channels
notes: Claim read: metal-clad cable of parallel superconducting sub-cables with thermally conductive wraps and cooling channels; quench current diverts to neighbors. 2025 CN utility-model activity at cable level adjacent to NI current-sharing; unexamined-grade scope.

title: Fusion reactor superconducting magnet system based on high temperature superconductivity
title_zh: 基于高温超导的聚变堆超导磁体系统
assignee: Hefei Institutes of Physical Science, CAS (中国科学院合肥物质科学研究院)
claim_theme: HTS CICC TF >15 T plus hybrid LTS/HTS CS system
notes: Claim read: three-subsystem fusion magnet set wound from ReBCO CICC with steel armor; no NI/turn-resistance claims. Evidences ASIPP/HFIPS center of gravity = insulated CICC route, not NI/Rc engineering. U-028 context.

title: Fusion reactor superconducting magnet system
assignee: Hefei Institutes of Physical Science, CAS
claim_theme: Graded hybrid windings with integrated supply and quench diagnostics
indep_claim_gist: System: superconducting magnet unit with graded hybrid windings (different superconductors per field grade, Bi2212/ReBCO above 16 T); modular DC supply with multi-pulse phase shifting; quench diagnostics combining resistive voltage, distributed fiber sensing, ML voiceprint analysis.
notes: HFIPS enforcing in US/JP (granted 2026) - CN institute going outbound. System-level bundle of winding grading + drive + diagnostics touches the C12xC10 seam; per-coil factory QC not claimed. U-028, U-001 context.

title: Superconducting magnet mechanical modeling and analysis method
title_zh: 一种超导磁体力学建模分析方法
assignee: Huazhong University of Science and Technology (华中科技大学)
claim_theme: Hierarchical magnet-coil-tape stress FEA with delamination check
notes: Claim read: three-level FEA (magnet to worst coil to worst tape) verifying delamination/tearing; insulated coils, no screening-current or NI content. Nearest CN art found to winding-parameter screening-strain mitigation (WS-5) - confirms gap.
